creator: mandrews@bit0.com
text: I'm experimenting with Vultr for a work project and the www/vultr-cli port is at version 2.12.2, which doesn't understand the newer "type" field for creating block devices -- and it defaults to a type that is only in a small fraction of their data centers, vs a more widely available one.  The fix for this is in 2.13.0.  The latest, though, is 2.14.1.
